title: senecio pauciflorus var. croceus
intro: Senecio pauciflorus var. croceus is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is commonly known as the few-flowered ragwort. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and soothing digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Senecio pauciflorus var. croceus is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
